name: WhatWeb

core_modules.name: FINGERPRINTER
core_modules.title: Web Technology Fingerprinting
core_modules.description: Fingerprints content management systems, web servers, JavaScript frameworks, analytics tags, and web application firewalls.

keyTakeaways.title: SECURITY_FINDING
keyTakeaways.content: Example.com WhatWeb Analysis

keyTakeaways.title: SECURITY_FINDING
keyTakeaways.content: HTTP Headers Analysis

keyTakeaways.title: SECURITY_FINDING
keyTakeaways.content: SSL/TLS analysis with tools like testssl.sh

attackPaths.title: CVE_EXPLOITATION
attackPaths.desc: Target identified service version vulnerabilities with publicly available public exploits.

attackPaths.title: CREDENTIAL_SPRAYING
attackPaths.desc: Leverage exposed logins or portals to perform low-and-slow default password brute forcing.

attackPaths.title: DATA_EXFILTRATION
attackPaths.desc: Utilize open directory listings or exposed databases to directly siphon sensitive business assets.

scenarios.name: Test for HTTP/3 protocol-specific vulnerabilities
objectiveList: Use specialized HTTP/3 clients for deeper inspection

keyTakeaways.title: OPERATIONAL_EFFECTIVENESS
keyTakeaways.content: Automated execution profiles of WhatWeb accelerate baseline information gathering.

keyTakeaways.title: SECURITY_EXPOSURE
keyTakeaways.content: Exposing target systems configurations through OSINT indicators helps plan subsequent exploits.

keyTakeaways.title: REMEDIATION_PRIORITY
keyTakeaways.content: Patching exposed vulnerabilities immediately restricts the available entry points for attackers.

scenarios.name: Test for open redirects
scenarios.script:
whatweb -a 3 -v https://mozilla.org
whatweb -i domains.txt -v
whatweb 93.184.216.34-93.184.216.40
whatweb https://example.com:443 https://example.com:80 https://example.com:8080
whatweb -a 3 --log-json=results.json https://www.wikipedia.org
whatweb -a 3 --grep "Apache" https://apache.org
whatweb -a 3 --user-agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64)" https://httpbin.org/user-agent
whatweb -a 3 --user=admin --password=password https://httpbin.org/basic-auth/admin/password

troubleshooting.cause: Web application firewall (WAF) blocking automated HTTP requests.
troubleshooting.resolution: Reduce aggressiveness level to 1 (stealth mode) or change User-Agent.

security: Ensure all execution requests with WhatWeb are performed within authorized scope. Log all output artifacts securely and protect the integrity of local credential wordlists.
